findings.title: Semantic date validation gap: month=13 returns 500 instead of 400 INVALID_DATE
findings.detail: The regex ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$ passes 2026-13-01 (month 13). new Date('2026-13-01T00:00:00Z') yields Invalid Date. asOf.toISOString() throws RangeError at get-revenue-metrics.ts:61, caught by the global error handler as 500 INTERNAL_ERROR instead of 400 INVALID_DATE. Not a security defect — no PII leaked, not exploitable, no data loss. Safe-to-defer: future hardening to add isNaN(asOf.getTime()) check before calling getRevenueMetrics.
